'''Tahbotza''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who worked for [[Sebolto]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by the [[Malastare Special Service]] for attempting to blackmail members of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Ask Aak/Legends|Ask Aak's]] staff. His last known location was at the outskirts of [[Pixelito/Legends|Pixelito]] City. His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]], worth 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 [[Death/Legends|dead]], was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].
